calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing On Application For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Mar-05-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances by ZOOM:
Karen Uchiyama, Law Offices of Karen Uchiyama, 415-563-9300, for Plaintiff, Biana Chernoguz et al.
Wayne Kessler Snodgrass, City Attorney, CCSF, 415-554-4675,for Defendant San Francisco Rent Stabiliation Board.
Thomas Drohan, Legal Assistance to The Elderly,415-538-3333, for Defendant/Real Party in Interest, Leana Perez, Francisco Armas.
Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-384-0003, raquel@transcriptlegal.com, Court Reporter.

ARGUED. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER BIANA CHERNOGUZ'S Notice Of Hearing On Application For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is DENIED. No abuse of discretion shown. Counsel, for Defendant San Francisco Rent Stabilization Board, Wayne Snodgrass is to prepare and submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-384-0003, raquel@transcriptlegal.com., Reported (D501)

Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Application For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER BIANA CHERNOGUZ Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Application For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is OFF CALENDAR, Re-noticed for March 5, 2021. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal For Delay In Prcsecution; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: REAL PARTY IN INTEREST LEANA PEREZ, FRANCISCO ARMAS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal For Delay In Prcsecution is DENIED without prejudice, subject to Petitioner setting the hearing on the Petition for Writ of Mandate. Notice and supporting documents shall be filed and served no later 5:00 p.m. on January 21, 2021. (See paragraph 19 of counsel opposition declaration). If the hearing is not set, this motion will be granted. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal For Delay In Prcsecution; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-15-2021 Continued To Jan-22-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Laura Friedli, Esq, 415-757-4506, for Real Party in Interest, Leanna Perez and Francisco Armas via CourtCall
Thomas Drohan, Esq., 415-538-333, for Real Party in Interest, Leanna Perez and Francisco Armas

Hearing is held. Court addres the issue of proof of service with Counsel. Mr. Drohan states that an amended Proof of Service was filed with the court on January 14, 2021. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

REAL PARTY IN INTEREST LEANA PEREZ, FRANCISCO ARMAS Motion For Dismissal For Delay In Prcsecution is continued to January 22, 22021 at 9:30 a.m. D. 501. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not Reported (D501/CFH)
